title: Trump shooter visited rally site July 7, anti-immigrant posts found
shortDescription: Secret Service and FBI officials testified Tuesday before two Senate committees on the assassination attempt of former President Donald Trump.

title: Who is running for Wyoming state senate? Crucial races to watch.
shortDescription: As Wyoming's Republicans fracture along national lines, a look at competitive state senate races.

title: Biden calls for sweeping Supreme Court changes | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Sheriff in charge of the deputy who killed Sonya Massey declines to resign, while asking for forgiveness. More stories on The Excerpt.

title: Donald Trump stumps for Kari Lake on Arizona primary eve
shortDescription: Running through his own political agenda, Trump cited Lake as a key ally as Arizona Republicans pick a Senate nominee.

title: 2 spectators critically injured at Trump rally released from hospital
shortDescription: James Copenhaver, 74, and David Dutch, 57, were transported to Allegheny General Hospital after being critically wounded during the July 13 rally.

title: Granholm talks Biden 2024 exit, electric vehicles: 4 takeaways
shortDescription: Energy Secretary and former Michigan Gov. Jennifer Granholm discussed President Joe Biden's 2024 exit, electric vehicles and more during an interview.

title: Stricter voter ID laws disenfranchise thousands in swing states
shortDescription: Ohio now has the strictest voter ID law in the U.S., preventing thousands from voting. Other states with new ID laws include Florida and Georgia.

title: Republican Arizona mayor endorses Kamala Harris over Donald Trump
shortDescription: John Giles, mayor of Mesa, Arizona, endorsed Vice President Kamala Harris over his party's nominee on Monday, saying she's 'competent, just and fair'

title: Biden honors Civil Rights Act
shortDescription: President Biden spoke about looking to the future and protecting civil rights at the LBJ Library in Austin, Texas.

title: Trump campaign releases official platform
shortDescription: Here are some of the proposals in Donald Trump's "Agenda47," his official campaign platform.

title: Venezuela election unrest could provoke new exodus to the US
shortDescription: Nearly 8 million Venezuelans have fled because of corruption and runaway inflation during Maduro's 13-year rule.

title: Lawmaker's death creates ballot complication for Hawaii voters
shortDescription: Hawaii primary voters face unusual situation: deceased State Rep. Nakashima remains on ballot as the sole candidate.

title: No need to replace or withdraw Biden's name from ballots | Fact check
shortDescription: Biden wasn't formally nominated by the Democratic Party so his name would not need to be "withdrawn" from any ballots.

title: Biden proposes constitutional amendment limiting presidential immunity
shortDescription: Biden outlined a vision for the future including Supreme Court term limits and a constitutional amendment to llimit the immunity of the president.

title: Trump calls Harris 'evil' as party struggles to coalesce on attacks
shortDescription: Republicans are trying several strategies to attack Kamala Harris. Donald Trump called her 'evil' at a rally in St.Cloud Minnesota. Watch video.

title: President Biden calls for SCOTUS reforms
shortDescription: None of Biden's proposals have any chance of passing in a divided Congress.
